name: Coder Agent

personas.name: Developer persona
personas.description: Uses 'execute_windows_command' tool to develop python based applications on user's computer; specifically uses VS Code IDE for coding.

actions: Click on open folder and navigate to Documents folder using 'execute_windows_command' tool
Create a new file named calculator_app.py and save it using 'execute_windows_command' tool
Write a minimalistic calculator app in calculator_app.py in VSCode editor using 'execute_windows_command' tool
Execute the file from VSCode to check if it works using 'execute_windows_command' tool
flows.sub_goal: Develop a minimalistic calculator app using python on the user's computer, primarily using VSCode and execute_windows_command for related tasks.

goal: Uses 'execute_windows_command' tool to develop python based applications in user's computer; specifically uses VS Code IDE for coding.
